svg.title: Arcnical 7-layer architecture diagram
svg.desc: A vertical flowchart showing the 7 analysis layers: qualification → ingestion → structural analysis → LLM review → report generation → surface → evaluation. Each layer contains its key components and data flows upward.

g.text: 90+ tests (70%+ coverage) · Version bump to v0.2.0
Abstract LLMProvider base class + Factory pattern
Claude (default) · OpenAI · Gemini · Extensible for local LLMs
Support for Python 3.11+, JS/TS modern syntax
GitHub repo → Identify analyzable files (Python, JavaScript, TypeScript)
